post-merge review: BLOCK (flagged for human)
Diff contains only execution metadata files (manifest.json, result.json). No cli/internal/federation/ package, no state.go, persistence.go, or test files. None of the acceptance criteria are met.
result_rev=d32163cf068607cbe9e14c4fcad8c042c1f51301
base_rev=d0148d0b2ca5ec8a165dfd858be7b9da6346cb8c

No code changes made — all acceptance criteria for B14.2 are already satisfied at the base rev 3f97b3f6.

What is done:
- cli/internal/federation/ package exists with state.go, persistence.go, state_test.go
  (introduced in commit 0dd3cead "feat(federation): add internal/federation state
  types + persistence [ddx-1bbd1096]", which is an ancestor of base-rev 3f97b3f6).
- state.go defines:
    * FederationRegistry { SchemaVersion, Spokes }
    * SpokeRecord { NodeID, Name, URL, DDxVersion, SchemaVersion, Capabilities,
      RegisteredAt, LastHeartbeat, Status }
    * SpokeStatus enum covering registered/active/stale/offline/degraded with
      Valid() guard.
    * NewRegistry, FindSpoke, UpsertSpoke, RemoveSpoke, SetStatus,
      ReconcileLiveness reconciliation helper.
- persistence.go implements:
    * DefaultStatePath honoring XDG_DATA_HOME, default ~/.local/share/ddx/federation-state.json.
    * LoadState/LoadStateFrom: missing-file → fresh registry; malformed JSON →
      quarantine to ".corrupt-<ts>" and return fresh registry; pre-versioned
      files default to CurrentSchemaVersion (migration stub).
    * SaveState/SaveStateTo: tmpfile + fsync + chmod 0600 + atomic rename, with
      a process-wide write mutex.
- state_test.go covers all AC tests and they pass:
    * TestRoundTrip — load/save round-trip + schema_version present in JSON +
      0600 file mode.
    * TestLoadMissingFileReturnsFreshRegistry — missing-file fresh-init.
    * TestLoadMalformedFileRecovers — malformed-file recovery + quarantine.
    * TestSchemaMigrationStub — schema migration stub (legacy → current).
    * TestStatusTransitions — registered/active/stale + offline/degraded
      stickiness + invalid-status rejection.
    * TestUpsertAndRemove — invariants on UpsertSpoke / RemoveSpoke.
    * TestConcurrentWriteSafety — 16 concurrent SaveStateTo, no leftover tmpfiles.
    * TestDefaultStatePathHonorsXDG — XDG_DATA_HOME and ~/.local/share fallback.

Verification this attempt:
  $ cd cli && go test ./internal/federation/
  ok  github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/ddx/internal/federation  0.002s

What is blocking:
- Nothing. The previous review-block notes ("Diff contains only execution
  metadata files") appear to refer to earlier attempt artifacts; the package
  itself is already merged into the base branch at 3f97b3f6.

What a follow-up attempt would need:
- None for B14.2. If the reviewer wants additions beyond the AC (e.g., HTTP
  layer, additional reconciliation rules), those belong in subsequent beads
  (B14.3+) per the bead description ("No HTTP layer yet").
rationale: No code changes made — all acceptance criteria for B14.2 are already satisfied at the base rev 3f97b3f6.
